name: Carlisle Acacia Wood Dining Bench Light Gray - Christopher Knight Home
description:
Add a perfect focal point to your backyard or patio space and transform the way you enjoy outdoor meals. Our wonderfully designed bench features a refined modern industrial aesthetic, including a rich acacia wood top with plenty of seating space to accommodate a scenic picnic meal. Finished with a gorgeous slat panel look, our bench pairs seamlessly with a variety of table options.

MODERN INDUSTRIAL STYLE: Our dining bench incorporates a powder-coated frame with rich wood to create an understated modern industrial design.

ACACIA WOOD: This durable hardwood is a solid, heavy frame that naturally withstands the elements and resists wear and tear.

SLAT PANEL DESIGN: The bench top features beautiful slat paneling, giving it a sophisticated, classic look.

WEATHER RESISTANT: This bench is designed and tested to resist mild weather conditions. We always advise covering, storing, or providing other protection to our furniture in the event of heavy or repeated exposure to the elements, including water and UV rays.

DIMENSIONS: This dining bench is 63.00" W x 14.75" D x 17.50" H.
